project.name: Spatial Transcriptomics and Single-Cell Biology Demo
project.description: Real demo workspace generated from OpenAlex topic evidence for spatial transcriptomics and single-cell/multiomics biology.

review_terms: industry affiliation requiring manual fit check
exclusion_terms: off-topic omics without single-cell or spatial evidence

constraints.age_policy: Leave PI age blank unless a public source or transparent estimate is collected in a real workspace.
additional_constraints: demo rows must be real people from current scholarly sources
do not infer current role, age, honors, or hiring status from OpenAlex alone
Google Scholar links are search links unless later replaced by verified author profiles

named_evidence_filters.name: OpenAlex topic: Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics
named_evidence_filters.description: Primary OpenAlex topic used to discover real demo rows.

named_evidence_filters.description: Exact journal label from OpenAlex source metadata.
